title: Red Wedding
description: At the wedding feast of Edmure Tully and Roslin Frey, Walder Frey and Roose Bolton betray Robb Stark. Robb, Catelyn, Grey Wind, and most of the Northern army are slaughtered under guest right.

title: Purple Wedding
description: King Joffrey Baratheon dies of poison at his own wedding feast to Margaery Tyrell. The strangler poison was concealed in Sansa Stark's hairnet and administered by Olenna Tyrell.

title: Battle of the Blackwater
description: Stannis Baratheon's fleet attacks King's Landing by sea. Tyrion destroys much of the fleet with wildfire, but the battle nearly falls until Tywin Lannister and the Tyrells arrive as reinforcements.

title: Daenerys Hatches the Dragons
description: Daenerys walks into Khal Drogo's funeral pyre with three petrified dragon eggs. She emerges unburned with three living dragons — the first seen in the world in over a century.

title: Ned Stark's Execution
description: Eddard Stark is publicly beheaded on the steps of the Great Sept of Baelor on King Joffrey's orders, despite Cersei and the Small Council's plan to let him take the black.

title: Daenerys in the House of the Undying
description: Daenerys enters the House of the Undying Ones in Qarth seeking knowledge. She experiences a series of prophetic visions before the Undying attempt to drain her life. Drogon rescues her by setting the building ablaze.

title: Battle of Castle Black
description: The Night's Watch defends the Wall against Mance Rayder's wildling army attacking from both sides. Jon Snow leads the defense of Castle Black. Stannis Baratheon's cavalry arrives and shatters the wildling forces.

title: Tyrion Kills Tywin
description: After Jaime frees him from the black cells, Tyrion discovers Shae in Tywin's bed and strangles her. He then finds Tywin in the privy and kills him with a crossbow bolt.

title: Bran Reaches the Three-Eyed Crow
description: After a long and harrowing journey beyond the Wall, Bran, Hodor, Meera, and Jojen reach the cave of the Three-Eyed Crow — the last greenseer, Brynden Rivers — hidden beneath a great weirwood tree.

title: Jon Snow's Assassination
description: Brothers of the Night's Watch, led by Bowen Marsh, stab Jon Snow repeatedly in a mutiny after Jon announces plans to march on Winterfell to confront Ramsay Bolton. Jon falls in the snow, his wounds steaming.

title: Cersei's Walk of Shame
description: Cersei Lannister is forced to walk naked through the streets of King's Landing from the Great Sept of Baelor to the Red Keep as penance for her sins, confessed to the High Sparrow.

title: Battle of the Whispering Wood
description: Robb Stark lures Jaime Lannister into an ambush in the Whispering Wood, capturing him and destroying his force. This is Robb's first great military victory and establishes his reputation as a battle commander.

title: Robert Baratheon's Death
description: King Robert Baratheon dies from wounds sustained during a boar hunt, his reflexes dulled by strongwine provided by his squire Lancel Lannister at Cersei's instruction. His death triggers the War of the Five Kings.

title: Bran's Fall from the Tower
description: Bran Stark climbs a tower in Winterfell and discovers Cersei and Jaime Lannister in an intimate embrace. Jaime pushes Bran from the window to protect the secret, crippling him and setting the central conflict in motion.

title: Renly Baratheon's Death by Shadow
description: Renly Baratheon is killed in his tent by a shadow assassin birthed by Melisandre using Stannis's life force. Brienne of Tarth is present and falsely blamed for the murder, beginning her quest to clear her name.

title: Theon Captures Winterfell
description: Theon Greyjoy seizes Winterfell with a small force of Ironborn while the castle is lightly defended. He takes Bran and Rickon captive and declares himself Prince of Winterfell, betraying the Starks who raised him.

title: Daenerys Conquers Meereen
description: Daenerys takes the slaver city of Meereen by infiltrating the sewers and sparking a slave uprising from within. She frees the slaves and installs herself as queen, beginning her controversial rule over Slaver's Bay.

title: Lysa Arryn's Death at the Eyrie
description: After Lysa Arryn attempts to push Sansa Stark through the Moon Door in a jealous rage, Petyr Baelish intervenes and shoves Lysa to her death instead, revealing his true ruthlessness and securing his control over the Vale.

title: Brienne Encounters Lady Stoneheart
description: Brienne of Tarth is captured by the Brotherhood Without Banners, now led by Lady Stoneheart — the resurrected Catelyn Stark. Stoneheart sentences Brienne to hang for carrying a Lannister sword and serving the family she blames for her death.

title: Euron Greyjoy Wins the Kingsmoot
description: After Balon Greyjoy's death, the Ironborn hold a Kingsmoot on Old Wyk to choose their next ruler. Euron Crow's Eye wins by presenting Dragonbinder, a Valyrian horn he claims can bind dragons, and promising the Ironborn dominion over all Westeros.

title: Daenerys Rides Drogon in Daznak's Pit
description: During the reopened fighting pits of Meereen, Drogon descends into Daznak's Pit and kills several people. Daenerys approaches him, mounts him for the first time, and flies away from the city, leaving her court in chaos.

title: Young Griff Lands in Westeros
description: Young Griff, claiming to be Aegon Targaryen son of Rhaegar, lands in the Stormlands with the Golden Company. Guided by Jon Connington, they begin seizing castles and establishing a foothold in Westeros ahead of Daenerys.

title: Quentyn Martell's Death
description: Prince Quentyn Martell of Dorne attempts to tame one of Daenerys's dragons in the catacombs beneath Meereen. Rhaegal sets him ablaze and he dies of his burns days later, ending Doran Martell's carefully laid plans for a Targaryen alliance.
